di-annotations/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate dependency from javax.inject to jakarta.inject-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17.
di-annotations/pom.xml.why_exists: Classes in the javax.inject package are no longer available or compatible with the Jakarta EE 9+ namespace used by Spring Boot 3, leading to ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.inject dependency with jakarta.inject-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
di-processor/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject classes are removed from the classpath in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency to provide Jakarta EE 9+ annotation classes.
di-processor/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation classes are removed from the classpath in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

di-processor/src/main/java/com/github/th.general_idea: Migrate javax.inject import to jakarta.inject to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
di-processor/src/main/java/com/github/th.why_exists: javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile or link against Spring Boot 3 dependencies which use jakarta namespace.

di-processor/src/main/java/com/github/th.general_idea: Migrate import from javax.inject to jakarta.inject to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
di-processor/src/main/java/com/github/th.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found) or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

di-processor/src/main/java/com/github/th.general_idea: Migrate JSR-330 dependency injection annotations from the javax namespace to the jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
di-processor/src/main/java/com/github/th.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using javax.inject.Inject causes a compile error (cannot find symbol) on the target platform.

di-processor/src/main/java/com/github/th.general_idea: Migrate dependency injection imports from the Java EE javax namespace to the Jakarta EE jakarta namespace.
di-processor/src/main/java/com/github/th.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.inject does not exist in Jakarta EE environments (e.g., Spring Boot 3.x / Java 17+ stacks).

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate dependency from javax.inject to jakarta.inject-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject artifacts are not available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; using them causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime when running on Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag for Java 17 instead of separate source/target flags.
pom.xml.why_exists: While source/target 1.8 compiles, it produces bytecode incompatible with Java 17 features and does not enforce the target JDK level correctly for a Java 17 migration.

test/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag for Java 17 instead of separate source/target flags.
test/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for cross-compilation in newer JDKs, and Java 8 source/target settings are incompatible with Java 17 runtime requirements.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Migrate dependency injection annotations from the Java EE javax namespace to the Jakarta EE jakarta namespace.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error 'package javax.inject does not exist' on the target JDK/runtime.
